seoTitle: Upper Swan vs Upper Warren — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Swan and Upper Warren. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Swan vs Upper Warren: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Swan and Upper Warren.
heading: Upper Swan vs Upper Warren — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Swan, Western Australia and Upper Warren, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Warren has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Upper Swan (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Swan or Upper Warren safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Swan has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Upper Warren scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Swan scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Warren scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Swan or Upper Warren?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Warren has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
